Author: Josh
UsageNotes: This template provides an illustration of utilizing SQL_CLR to send emails with excel attachments, although it should be noted that this process is not fully functional.
ImplementationNotes: Within the stored procedure Prescript_Example_SendEmailWithExcelAttachment, the clr_SimpleEmail is employed to attach excel file and dispatch an email.
Name: EXAMPLE_EMAIL_EXCELATTACHMENT
Description:
EXAMPLE_EMAIL_EXCELATTACHMENT

This template provides an illustration of utilizing SQL_CLR to send emails with excel attachments, although it should be noted that this process is not fully functional.

Within the stored procedure Prescript_Example_SendEmailWithExcelAttachment, the clr_SimpleEmail is employed to attach excel file and dispatch an email.
